requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for LED Lighting — MOIT / TCVN
requirement_topic.zh: LED 照明最低能效标准（MEPS）——工贸部 / TCVN
requirement_topic.zht: LED 照明最低能效標準（MEPS）——工貿部 / TCVN

summary.en: Vietnam regulates the energy performance of lighting equipment through Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) administered by the Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT) under the Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy and its implementing decisions. LED lighting products that fall within the MOIT-designated equipment list must meet the minimum luminous efficacy (lm/W) thresholds set in the applicable TCVN standard before they can be placed on the Vietnamese market; products below the MEPS floor are prohibited from import and sale. The technical basis for LED lamp performance is TCVN 11844 (Light-emitting diode lamps — Energy efficiency) and related TCVN performance standards adopting IEC methods. Testing must be performed by a MOIT-recognised laboratory and the efficacy result is the input to both the MEPS pass/fail decision and the energy-label star rating (see ledvn-ecodesign-02). Exact lm/W floors vary by product sub-category — verify the current MOIT decision and TCVN edition for the specific product type.
summary.zh: 越南通过最低能效标准（MEPS）对照明设备的能效进行管理，由工贸部（MOIT）依据《节约和高效用能法》及其实施决定执行。属于 MOIT 指定设备清单内的 LED 照明产品，在投放越南市场前须满足适用 TCVN 标准规定的最低光效（lm/W）阈值；低于 MEPS 下限的产品禁止进口和销售。LED 灯性能的技术基础为 TCVN 11844（发光二极管灯——能效）及采用 IEC 方法的相关 TCVN 性能标准。检测须由 MOIT 认可的实验室进行，光效结果既是 MEPS 合格/不合格判定的输入，也是能效标签星级评定的输入（见 ledvn-ecodesign-02）。确切的 lm/W 下限因产品子类别而异——请核查具体产品类型适用的现行 MOIT 决定及 TCVN 版本。
summary.zht: 越南通過最低能效標準（MEPS）對照明設備的能效進行管理，由工貿部（MOIT）依據《節約和高效用能法》及其實施決定執行。屬於 MOIT 指定設備清單內的 LED 照明產品，在投放越南市場前須滿足適用 TCVN 標準規定的最低光效（lm/W）閾值；低於 MEPS 下限的產品禁止進口和銷售。LED 燈性能的技術基礎為 TCVN 11844（發光二極管燈——能效）及採用 IEC 方法的相關 TCVN 性能標準。檢測須由 MOIT 認可的實驗室進行，光效結果既是 MEPS 合格/不合格判定的輸入，也是能效標籤星級評定的輸入（見 ledvn-ecodesign-02）。確切的 lm/W 下限因產品子類別而異——請核查具體產品類型適用的現行 MOIT 決定及 TCVN 版本。

standards_or_laws: Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy (No. 50/2010/QH12) and MOIT implementing decisions on minimum energy performance standards and energy labelling roadmap for lighting equipment
TCVN 11844 — Light-emitting diode (LED) lamps — Energy efficiency requirements (MOIT/STAMEQ, adopting IEC performance methods)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires). It defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest) at least 90 lm/W, Grade 2 at least 80 lm/W, Grade 3 at least 70 lm/W, with Grade 3 the minimum required for market entry in China. China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is administered by SAMR. While both China and Vietnam set a minimum efficacy floor plus a graded label, the absolute thresholds, test report acceptance, and label format are set independently — a Chinese CEL registration does not satisfy the Vietnamese MEPS or MOIT label obligation.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）至少 90 lm/W，2 级至少 80 lm/W，3 级至少 70 lm/W，3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。虽然中越两国均设有最低光效下限加分级标签，但绝对阈值、检测报告接受及标签格式各自独立设定——中国 CEL 注册不满足越南 MEPS 或 MOIT 标签义务。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）至少 90 lm/W，2 級至少 80 lm/W，3 級至少 70 lm/W，3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。雖然中越兩國均設有最低光效下限加分級標籤，但絕對閾值、檢測報告接受及標籤格式各自獨立設定——中國 CEL 注冊不滿足越南 MEPS 或 MOIT 標籤義務。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR

gap.en: Vietnam MEPS and China GB 30255 both impose a minimum efficacy floor, so a product already meeting CN Grade 2 (at least 80 lm/W) will usually clear a typical Vietnamese MEPS floor, but a CN Grade 3 product (70 lm/W) may sit at or below the Vietnamese minimum for some sub-categories — verify the current MOIT/TCVN floor for the exact product type. The substantive gaps are procedural rather than purely numeric: (1) Vietnam requires testing by a MOIT-recognised laboratory and a Vietnamese conformity/efficacy test report — a Chinese CEL or GB 30255 report is not automatically accepted; (2) Vietnam ties MEPS to MOIT energy-label registration (see ledvn-ecodesign-02), a separate filing with no CN mutual recognition; (3) unlike the EU Ecodesign Regulation, Vietnam's lighting MEPS does not impose the same binding cross-cutting minimums on CRI, lifetime, and power factor for all product types — manufacturers should confirm which performance parameters are mandatory in the applicable TCVN edition. Always verify the exact lm/W floor for the specific product sub-category against the current MOIT decision.
gap.zh: 越南 MEPS 与中国 GB 30255 均设有最低光效下限，因此已达到中国 2 级（至少 80 lm/W）的产品通常能通过典型的越南 MEPS 下限，但中国 3 级产品（70 lm/W）在部分子类别可能处于越南最低值或以下——请核查具体产品类型适用的现行 MOIT/TCVN 下限。实质差距更多在程序而非纯数值：（1）越南要求由 MOIT 认可的实验室检测并出具越南合格/能效检测报告——中国 CEL 或 GB 30255 报告不自动被接受；（2）越南将 MEPS 与 MOIT 能效标签注册挂钩（见 ledvn-ecodesign-02），属独立备案且无中国互认；（3）与欧盟生态设计法规不同，越南照明 MEPS 未对所有产品类型施加同样具约束力的显色指数、寿命及功率因数横向最低值——制造商应确认适用 TCVN 版本中哪些性能参数为强制要求。请始终对照现行 MOIT 决定核查具体产品子类别的确切 lm/W 下限。
gap.zht: 越南 MEPS 與中國 GB 30255 均設有最低光效下限，因此已達到中國 2 級（至少 80 lm/W）的產品通常能通過典型的越南 MEPS 下限，但中國 3 級產品（70 lm/W）在部分子類別可能處於越南最低值或以下——請核查具體產品類型適用的現行 MOIT/TCVN 下限。實質差距更多在程序而非純數值：（1）越南要求由 MOIT 認可的實驗室檢測並出具越南合格/能效檢測報告——中國 CEL 或 GB 30255 報告不自動被接受；（2）越南將 MEPS 與 MOIT 能效標籤注冊掛鈎（見 ledvn-ecodesign-02），屬獨立備案且無中國互認；（3）與歐盟生態設計法規不同，越南照明 MEPS 未對所有產品類型施加同樣具約束力的顯色指數、壽命及功率因數橫向最低值——製造商應確認適用 TCVN 版本中哪些性能參數為強制要求。請始終對照現行 MOIT 決定核查具體產品子類別的確切 lm/W 下限。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — LED lighting in the MOIT-designated equipment list must meet the applicable MEPS efficacy floor (TCVN basis) before import and sale in Vietnam; products below the floor are prohibited
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (at least 70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Vietnam enforces Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for designated LED lighting through MOIT under the Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy, with TCVN 11844 as the technical efficacy basis. A Chinese product meeting GB 30255 Grade 2 will usually clear a typical Vietnamese floor, but Grade 3 products may not for some sub-categories — verify the current MOIT/TCVN threshold for the specific product type. A Chinese CEL or GB 30255 test report is not automatically accepted; testing by a MOIT-recognised laboratory and MOIT energy-label registration are separate obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南通过工贸部（MOIT）依据《节约和高效用能法》对指定 LED 照明执行最低能效标准（MEPS），技术光效基础为 TCVN 11844。符合中国 GB 30255 二级的产品通常能通过典型的越南下限，但三级产品在部分子类别可能无法满足——请核查具体产品类型适用的现行 MOIT/TCVN 阈值。中国 CEL 或 GB 30255 检测报告不自动被接受；由 MOIT 认可实验室检测及 MOIT 能效标签注册属独立义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南通過工貿部（MOIT）依據《節約和高效用能法》對指定 LED 照明執行最低能效標準（MEPS），技術光效基礎為 TCVN 11844。符合中國 GB 30255 二級的產品通常能通過典型的越南下限，但三級產品在部分子類別可能無法滿足——請核查具體產品類型適用的現行 MOIT/TCVN 閾值。中國 CEL 或 GB 30255 檢測報告不自動被接受；由 MOIT 認可實驗室檢測及 MOIT 能效標籤注冊屬獨立義務。

requirement_topic.en: Vietnam Energy Label (MOIT) + Registration for LED Lighting
requirement_topic.zh: 越南能效标签（MOIT）+ LED 照明注册
requirement_topic.zht: 越南能效標籤（MOIT）+ LED 照明注冊

summary.en: Under Vietnam's Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy and the Prime Minister and MOIT decisions on the energy-labelling roadmap, designated lighting products carry the Vietnam MOIT energy label — a comparative star-rating label (typically one to five stars) for products above the MEPS floor, plus the comparative information format. Before affixing the label, the importer or manufacturer must register the product with MOIT (energy-labelling registration / self-declaration dossier with a recognised test report) and obtain the right to display the label. The label must appear on the product or packaging and in product information in Vietnam. The star rating is derived from the measured luminous efficacy relative to Vietnamese reference values. Registration is a pre-market step distinct from the QCVN 19 conformity certification and the CR mark.
summary.zh: 依据越南《节约和高效用能法》及总理与工贸部关于能效标签路线图的决定，指定照明产品须加施越南 MOIT 能效标签——一种针对高于 MEPS 下限产品的比较型星级标签（通常一至五星），并附比较信息格式。加施标签前，进口商或制造商须向工贸部进行产品注册（能效标签注册/含认可检测报告的自我声明卷宗）并取得展示标签的权利。标签须出现在越南境内的产品或包装及产品信息上。星级根据实测光效相对越南参考值得出。该注册是上市前步骤，与 QCVN 19 合格认证及 CR 标志相区别。
summary.zht: 依據越南《節約和高效用能法》及總理與工貿部關於能效標籤路線圖的決定，指定照明產品須加施越南 MOIT 能效標籤——一種針對高於 MEPS 下限產品的比較型星級標籤（通常一至五星），並附比較信息格式。加施標籤前，進口商或製造商須向工貿部進行產品注冊（能效標籤注冊/含認可檢測報告的自我聲明卷宗）並取得展示標籤的權利。標籤須出現在越南境內的產品或包裝及產品信息上。星級根據實測光效相對越南參考值得出。該注冊是上市前步驟，與 QCVN 19 合格認證及 CR 標誌相區別。

standards_or_laws: Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy (No. 50/2010/QH12) and MOIT energy-labelling implementing decisions for lighting equipment
TCVN energy-efficiency test methods for LED lamps (basis for the MOIT star rating)

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires. Products must be registered (filing/record-keeping with the competent body, e.g. CQC/CECP recognised arrangements) before affixing the CEL, which shows Grade 1 to 3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds. The CEL is administered within the SAMR framework. There is no mutual recognition between the Vietnamese MOIT energy-label registration and the Chinese CEL scheme — the formats (Vietnamese star rating vs Chinese 1 to 3 grade), reference values, and registries are independent.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附中国能效标识前完成注册（向主管机构备案/留档，如 CQC/CECP 认可安排），标识依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1 至 3 级，在市场监管总局（SAMR）框架内管理。越南 MOIT 能效标签注册与中国 CEL 方案之间不存在互认——其格式（越南星级 vs 中国 1 至 3 级）、参考值及注册系统各自独立。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附中國能效標識前完成注冊（向主管機構備案/留檔，如 CQC/CECP 認可安排），標識依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1 至 3 級，在市場監管總局（SAMR）框架內管理。越南 MOIT 能效標籤注冊與中國 CEL 方案之間不存在互認——其格式（越南星級 vs 中國 1 至 3 級）、參考值及注冊系統各自獨立。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered within the SAMR framework

gap.en: The Vietnam MOIT energy-label registration is a mandatory pre-market step with no CN mutual recognition. The Vietnamese star rating (one to five stars) and the Chinese CEL grade (1 to 3) are computed against different reference values and cannot be cross-mapped — a product's CN grade does not determine its Vietnamese star count. Both schemes are mandatory but independent: a product must be registered separately with MOIT for Vietnam and with the Chinese competent body for the CEL. Practical steps for a Chinese exporter: (1) obtain a measured luminous efficacy test report from a MOIT-recognised laboratory; (2) compile and submit the MOIT energy-labelling registration dossier through the in-country importer; (3) print the Vietnamese MOIT label (with Vietnamese-language content) on the product or packaging — the Chinese CEL artwork cannot be reused. The label and registration are separate from, and additional to, the QCVN 19 conformity certificate and CR mark.
gap.zh: 越南 MOIT 能效标签注册是强制性上市前步骤，无中国互认。越南星级（一至五星）与中国 CEL 等级（1 至 3 级）依据不同参考值计算，不可互换——产品的中国等级不能决定其越南星数。两种方案均为强制性但各自独立：产品须分别向 MOIT 注册（越南）及向中国主管机构注册（CEL）。中国出口商的实务步骤：（1）从 MOIT 认可实验室取得实测光效检测报告；（2）通过境内进口商编制并提交 MOIT 能效标签注册卷宗；（3）在产品或包装上印制越南 MOIT 标签（含越南语内容）——中国 CEL 图样不可复用。该标签及注册独立于 QCVN 19 合格证书及 CR 标志，且为额外要求。
gap.zht: 越南 MOIT 能效標籤注冊是強制性上市前步驟，無中國互認。越南星級（一至五星）與中國 CEL 等級（1 至 3 級）依據不同參考值計算，不可互換——產品的中國等級不能決定其越南星數。兩種方案均為強制性但各自獨立：產品須分別向 MOIT 注冊（越南）及向中國主管機構注冊（CEL）。中國出口商的實務步驟：（1）從 MOIT 認可實驗室取得實測光效檢測報告；（2）通過境內進口商編制並提交 MOIT 能效標籤注冊卷宗；（3）在產品或包裝上印製越南 MOIT 標籤（含越南語內容）——中國 CEL 圖樣不可復用。該標籤及注冊獨立於 QCVN 19 合格證書及 CR 標誌，且為額外要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Vietnam MOIT energy-label registration and display required for designated lighting products before market placement under the Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration required before affixing the CEL under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Vietnam MOIT energy label and its pre-market registration are mandatory for designated LED lighting and have no mutual recognition with the Chinese CEL. The Vietnamese star rating and CN 1 to 3 grade use different reference values and cannot be cross-mapped. A Chinese exporter must obtain a MOIT-recognised efficacy test report, register through the in-country importer, and print the Vietnamese-language MOIT label — this is separate from and additional to the QCVN 19 conformity certificate and CR mark.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南 MOIT 能效标签及其上市前注册对指定 LED 照明为强制要求，与中国 CEL 无互认。越南星级与中国 1 至 3 级采用不同参考值，不可互换。中国出口商须取得 MOIT 认可的光效检测报告，通过境内进口商注册，并印制越南语 MOIT 标签——此项独立于 QCVN 19 合格证书及 CR 标志，且为额外要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南 MOIT 能效標籤及其上市前注冊對指定 LED 照明為強制要求，與中國 CEL 無互認。越南星級與中國 1 至 3 級採用不同參考值，不可互換。中國出口商須取得 MOIT 認可的光效檢測報告，通過境內進口商注冊，並印製越南語 MOIT 標籤——此項獨立於 QCVN 19 合格證書及 CR 標誌，且為額外要求。
